reviews.review_msg: Maybe these folks would have had better luck with Dr. Parker if they even knew what class they were taking. As you can see, she's listed as in the phil dept, yet none of the classes listed are phil classes.
makes you feel very uncomfortable in class (especially for first year students). encourages you to speak then embarrasses you if you're wrong. a year later- shes my least favourite professor.

Seemed like an okay class and I cruised along to a decent mark. She did ramble on at times about information and history figures which weren't relevant to the course but it was kind of interesting for general knowledge. I can't say much about ease of marking because the TA did all of mine   .

She was amazing. Extremely helpful and open, gives very constructive criticism. She was fun and gave us interesting and engaging assignments to complete. Really knew her stuff, too. Could ramble a little at times, but most profs do. Loved, loved, loved this class!

Extremely engaging and passionate speaker. Encourages open and critical thinking. High expectations, but a fair and constructive marker. I walk away feeling better equipped to handle higher level courses. Work load felt a bit much at times, but it's first year and it only gets harder from here on out. Lectures and tutorials are just plain fun.
I agree with everything else that previous rated her .

Her lectures are not organized and I feel like I'm given so much information not necessary for anything (not tested on later and not helpful or relevant to any assignments). She's UNCLEAR. I don't get what her lectures' main points are. If you don't LOVE world lit don't take it..love as in willing to die for it

Wow, if you like being asked "why?" over and over again then this class is for you! Her lectures are all over the place and when you look at your notes, you have no idea whats going on. Definitely think of another class.

Exploration Students - DO NOT TAKE HER CLASS! She is very unclear, difficult, and should not be teaching a first year class. She assigns things without notifying us, takes forever to put things up when she says she is going too, and does not give much time for things to get done. Plus his lectures just confuse you even more!
